successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts exists and exports LeaveType, LeaveRequestStatus, LeaveRequest, and CreateLeaveRequestDto exactly as defined in the architecture specification.
src/modules/audit/audit.model.ts exists and exports AuditAction, AuditRecord, and CreateAuditRecordDto exactly as defined in the architecture specification.
src/modules/audit/audit.repository.ts exports AuditRepository and PostgreSqlAuditRepository using pg Pool and repository-pattern access.
src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts exports LeaveRepository and PostgreSqlLeaveRepository with createLeaveRequest, findById, and updateStatus methods matching the specified interfaces.
createLeaveRequest(dto) persists a LeaveRequest with status 'PENDING' and creates a corresponding AuditRecord with action 'CREATED'.
Vitest unit tests verify createLeaveRequest stores a PENDING LeaveRequest, writes an AuditRecord, and findById returns the persisted LeaveRequest.
Project documentation is updated to document LeaveType, LeaveRequestStatus, AuditAction enums and the AuditRecord relationship to LeaveRequest.

constraints: Use the repository pattern: all database access must go through repository interfaces.
All state-changing operations must write an audit record.
Implement PostgreSQL-backed repositories using pg Pool.
createLeaveRequest() must persist LeaveRequest records with status 'PENDING' only.
createLeaveRequest() must invoke AuditRepository.createAuditRecord with action 'CREATED'.
Maintain module boundaries: leave may depend on audit via repository interface; avoid reverse dependencies.
Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing; do not introduce API endpoints in this phase.
Do not log sensitive data, including PII.
RBAC enforcement applies to API endpoints, but no API endpoints are part of this phase.
No unhandled promise rejections; all async errors must be caught and handled.
Conform to the provided SQL schema for leave_requests and audit_records tables.
Keep implementation limited to the specified files and repository/model persistence foundation for Phase 1.
outOfScope: Employee persistence foundations beyond existing module ownership.
Leave workflow services (submission, approval, rejection business workflows).
Manager approval and rejection workflow logic.
Balance deductions and leave balance storage.
Any functionality beyond LeaveRequest and AuditRecord models, repositories, persistence behavior, tests, and documentation updates specified for Phase 1.
